# Backend Implementation Issues - Backup/Restore Feature

**Generated by:** backend-lead
**Date:** 2026-02-10
**Updated:** 2026-02-14 (status updates, annotation-based architecture corrections)
**Status:** MVP Implementation Complete

> **Architecture Note:** The DWO backup controller uses an in-process cron scheduler
> (NOT Kubernetes CronJobs). Backup status is stored in DevWorkspace annotations.
> See `BACKUP_ARCHITECTURE.md` for full details.

---

## Issue: [BACKEND-01] Implement Common Package Shared Types

**Team:** Backend
**Complexity:** Small
**Priority:** High (Blocking for all backend and frontend work)
**Status:** COMPLETED

**Description:**
Create shared TypeScript type definitions and constants in the `packages/common/` package that will be used by both backend and frontend for backup/restore functionality. This ensures type consistency across the entire application.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [x] Create `packages/common/src/types/backup.ts` with all backup-related interfaces
- [x] Create `packages/common/src/constants/backup.ts` with shared constants
- [x] Export types from `packages/common/src/index.ts`
- [x] Types include: `BackupStatus`, `BackupInfo`, `BackupItem`, `BackupListResponse`, `BackupValidationResult`, `RestoreWorkspaceParams`, `BackupConfig`
- [x] All enums and constants are properly documented

**Implementation Notes:**
- Types reflect annotation-based architecture (DevWorkspace annotations for status)
- Constants include DevWorkspace annotation keys, Job label selectors, and backup status UI mappings
- Shared between backend and frontend for API contract consistency

---

## Issue: [BACKEND-02] Implement BackupApiService

**Team:** Backend
**Complexity:** Medium
**Priority:** High (Blocking for API endpoints)
**Status:** COMPLETED

**Description:**
Implement the `BackupApiService` class that handles interactions with Kubernetes APIs to query backup configuration and status. This service reads backup status from **DevWorkspace annotations** (set by DWO's backup controller) and monitors Kubernetes Jobs for active backup operations.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [x] Create `BackupApiService` class in `packages/dashboard-backend/src/devworkspaceClient/services/backupApi.ts`
- [x] Implement `getClusterBackupConfig()` method using CustomObjectAPI for DevWorkspaceOperatorConfig
- [x] Implement `getWorkspaceBackupStatus()` method that reads DevWorkspace annotations and queries active Jobs
- [x] Implement `listBackupJobs()` method using BatchV1API
- [x] Implement `triggerBackup()` and `getBackupJobStatus()` methods
- [x] Parse cron expressions to calculate next scheduled backup time
- [x] Add comprehensive error handling
- [x] Unit tests created

**Architecture Note:**
Backup status is primarily read from DevWorkspace annotations set by DWO:
- `controller.devfile.io/last-backup-successful` - success/failure flag
- `controller.devfile.io/last-backup-finished-at` - completion timestamp
- `controller.devfile.io/last-backup-error` - error message (if failed)

Active backup Jobs are queried using label selector: `controller.devfile.io/devworkspace-backup=true`

**Files Created:**
- `packages/dashboard-backend/src/devworkspaceClient/services/backupApi.ts`
- `packages/dashboard-backend/src/devworkspaceClient/services/__tests__/backupApi.spec.ts`

---

## Issue: [BACKEND-03] Implement Registry Adapter Pattern and OpenShift Adapter

**Team:** Backend
**Complexity:** Large
**Priority:** High (Blocking for backup discovery)
**Status:** COMPLETED

**Description:**
Implement the registry adapter pattern with the OpenShift ImageStream adapter for MVP. The `OpenShiftRegistryAdapter` is used directly in the backup route handlers to discover backup images and validate image accessibility.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [x] Implement `OpenShiftRegistryAdapter` class using ImageStream API
- [x] OpenShift adapter queries ImageStream and ImageStreamTag APIs
- [x] Parse image labels to extract workspace metadata
- [x] Implement image accessibility validation via manifest queries
- [x] Integrated into backup API routes

**Architecture Note:**
The adapter is used directly in backup route handlers for listing backups, validating images, and retrieving metadata. Phase 2 may add a `GenericOCIRegistryAdapter` for external registries.

---

## Issue: [BACKEND-04] Implement Hybrid Registry Query (Internal + External)

**Team:** Backend
**Complexity:** Medium
**Priority:** ⚠️ CRITICAL (BLOCKING MVP - External registry backups not discoverable)
**Status:** ⚠️ NOT IMPLEMENTED - REQUIRED FOR MVP

**Description:**
Dashboard currently only queries OpenShift ImageStreams for backup discovery. This means backups pushed to external registries (Quay.io, Docker Hub, etc.) are NOT shown in the Backups tab. A hybrid approach is required to support both internal and external registries as per user requirement: "even MVP must support both internal and external registries".

**Root Cause:**
- Current implementation: Only queries ImageStreams via OpenShiftRegistryAdapter
- Problem: External registry backups have no ImageStream (images pushed to Quay.io, not internal registry)
- Result: "No Backups Available" shown even when backups exist in external registry

**Required Implementation:**
Modify `packages/dashboard-backend/src/devworkspaceClient/services/registryApi.ts` → `listBackupImages()`:

1. **Query ImageStreams** (existing logic - keep as-is):
   - Provides full metadata (size, tags, etc.)
   - Works for internal registry backups

2. **Query DevWorkspaces with backup annotations**:
   - Filter by `controller.devfile.io/last-backup-finished-at` annotation
   - Extract: workspaceName, timestamp from annotation
   - Construct imageUrl: `${dwocConfig.workspace.backupCronJob.registry.path}/${namespace}/${workspaceName}:latest`

3. **Merge results**:
   - Create Map by workspaceName
   - Add ImageStream results first (full data with size)
   - Add annotation-based results ONLY for workspaces not in ImageStream map
   - Return combined list

**Data Contract:**
- Internal registry backups: Full data (workspaceName, imageUrl, timestamp, sizeBytes, workspaceExists, labels)
- External registry backups: Minimal data (workspaceName, imageUrl, timestamp, sizeBytes=0, workspaceExists=true, labels={})

**MVP Impact:**
Without this fix, users cannot see or restore from external registry backups via Dashboard UI.

---

## Issue: [BACKEND-05] Implement JobApiService with WebSocket Support

**Team:** Backend
**Complexity:** Medium
**Priority:** Medium
**Status:** PARTIALLY COMPLETED (WebSocket implemented, dedicated JobApiService deferred)

**Description:**
Job monitoring is handled via the WebSocket endpoint (`backupJobWebSocket.ts`) which watches Kubernetes Job resources directly using the Watch API. A separate `JobApiService` class was not created as a standalone service.

**What Was Implemented:**
- [x] WebSocket endpoint for real-time Job monitoring (`/api/ws/backup-job/:namespace/:jobName`)
- [x] Job status phase handling: Pending, Running, Succeeded, Failed
- [x] Kubernetes Watch API integration for Job status changes
- [x] Auto-close WebSocket connection when job completes

**Deferred:**
- [ ] Separate `JobApiService` class (not needed for current architecture)
- [ ] `listInNamespace()` and `getByName()` methods (handled in BackupApiService)

---

## Issue: [BACKEND-06] Implement Backup API Routes

**Team:** Backend
**Complexity:** Large
**Priority:** High (Blocking for frontend integration)
**Status:** COMPLETED

**Description:**
REST API routes for backup status, discovery, validation, and metadata retrieval. Pagination was removed for MVP simplicity.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [x] Implement `GET /api/namespace/:namespace/devworkspaces/:workspaceName/backup-status` endpoint
- [x] Implement `GET /api/namespace/:namespace/backups` endpoint (no pagination for MVP)
- [x] Implement `POST /api/namespace/:namespace/backups/validate` endpoint
- [x] Implement `POST /api/namespace/:namespace/backups/metadata` endpoint
- [x] Register routes in main app.ts
- [x] Unit tests and integration tests created

**Architecture Note:**
- `backup-config` endpoint was not implemented separately; config is part of backup status response
- Pagination was removed for MVP (all backups returned in single response)
- Routes use `OpenShiftRegistryAdapter` directly for registry operations

**Files Created:**
- `packages/dashboard-backend/src/routes/api/backup.ts`
- `packages/dashboard-backend/src/routes/api/__tests__/backup.spec.ts`
- `packages/dashboard-backend/src/routes/api/__tests__/backupIntegration.spec.ts`

## Issue: [BACKEND-07] Enhance DevWorkspace Creation for Restore

**Team:** Backend
**Complexity:** Small
**Priority:** High (Blocking for restore functionality)
**Status:** PENDING (frontend restore component complete, backend integration pending)

**Description:**
Enhance the existing POST /api/namespace/:namespace/devworkspaces endpoint to accept restore parameters and set appropriate DevWorkspace attributes for backup restoration.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Accept optional `restoreFromBackup` boolean in request body
- [ ] Accept optional `backupImageUrl` string in request body
- [ ] When `restoreFromBackup` is true, set DevWorkspace attribute: `controller.devfile.io/restore-workspace: 'true'`
- [ ] If `backupImageUrl` provided, set attribute: `controller.devfile.io/restore-source-image: {url}`
- [ ] If `backupImageUrl` NOT provided, auto-generate from cluster backup config
- [ ] Auto-generation pattern: `{registry}/{namespace}/{workspaceName}:latest`
- [ ] Validate backup image URL format if provided
- [ ] Update unit tests to cover restore scenarios

**Note:** The frontend `RestoreFromBackup` component is implemented and sets these attributes on the client side. This backend enhancement ensures server-side validation and URL auto-generation.

**Files to Modify:**
- `packages/dashboard-backend/src/routes/api/devworkspaces.ts`
- `packages/dashboard-backend/src/routes/api/__tests__/devworkspaces.spec.ts`

---

## Issue: [BACKEND-08] Implement Job Status Polling Endpoint

**Team:** Backend
**Complexity:** Small
**Priority:** Medium (Fallback for WebSocket)
**Status:** DEFERRED (WebSocket implemented instead, polling not needed for MVP)

**Description:**
The WebSocket endpoint for real-time Job monitoring was implemented instead (BACKEND-09). A REST polling endpoint can be added later as a fallback if WebSocket connections are blocked by proxies in some environments.

## Issue: [BACKEND-09] Implement WebSocket Support for Backup Jobs

**Team:** Backend
**Complexity:** Medium
**Priority:** Medium
**Status:** COMPLETED

**Description:**
WebSocket endpoint for real-time backup/restore job status updates implemented ahead of schedule (was originally Phase 2).

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [x] Create WebSocket route: `/api/ws/backup-job/:namespace/:jobName`
- [x] Watch Kubernetes Job resource using Watch API
- [x] Emit `status-update` events on job status changes
- [x] Emit `completed` event when job succeeds or fails
- [x] Auto-close WebSocket connection when job completes
- [x] Unit tests created

**Files Created:**
- `packages/dashboard-backend/src/routes/api/backupJobWebSocket.ts`
- `packages/dashboard-backend/src/routes/api/__tests__/backupJobWebSocket.spec.ts`

**Event Types:**
- `status-update`: Contains phase (Pending/Running/Succeeded/Failed) and timestamps
- `completed`: Contains final status and backup image URL (if succeeded) or error message
